name: Fluffy | Mr. A’s farm
description:
🐶 || Fluffy

— from “Mr A’s farm” by NACHIOBOY —

!! demi-human mention, knotting !!

It seems like this morning, someone is watching you early in the morning. Probably missed you…

🐾

Open scenario! User can be anything — another hybrid, Milton, K, Little A, anything and anyone! Go wild!

Persona/chat memory recommended

Art from NACHIOBOY

— I see that Jai is lacking Mr A’s char bot so I took matters into my own hands 👁️ I also made K, Little A bot so far on my profile!

— 🫗 This bot is still a WIP, if I have some new facts or information. I’ll definitely come back and edit! SO do expect some errors and out of character behaviour…

— I like them chunky, chunky, plumpy, plumpy👅

— he’s actually so sweet guys

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

Update(14/09/25)

— Spoiler!! Anyway, after chapter 15 and found out that Mr. A and Fluffy did in fact dating… (no wonder he mourned sm my poor baby). I won’t be updating anything about that in this bot though! So it will still work for everyone ^^. Though, my future fluffy bot will work extra well if use Mr. A persona:3

(28/05/26) — added blank scenario

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

If the bot talks for you, it’s not the creator’s fault! Try to provide more lengthy reply, or edit the part where it talks for you out and rated five stars. The AI is not the best sometimes.

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝
